title: Girlfriend of Steel 2 Manga liscensed
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel 2 Manga liscensed             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Wed Jul 06, 2005 10:49 am Hey, did you know? ADV liscensed the Girlfriend of Steel 2 manga; it's going to appear in Newtype as Evangelion: Angelic Days. It will also appear in graphic novel format. Source: Here This is nothing too exciting, but I just thought I'd at least let you all know.

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel 2 Manga liscensed             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 06, 2005 6:10 pm RubberSoul wrote: It will also appear in graphic novel format.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Wed Jul 06, 2005 8:23 pm I'm guessing it will come in the novel form. They did that with the whole series already. Maybe I'll finally read a book eh?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jul 07, 2005 1:26 am I never cared much for the girlfreind of steel 2 manga. It's an interesting idea exploring the alternate universe from ep 26, but the idea was so poorly executed it wasnt able to hold my interest.

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel 2 Manga liscensed             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Jul 07, 2005 7:24 am The Eva Monkey wrote: RubberSoul wrote: It will also appear in graphic novel format.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Jul 07, 2005 9:48 am This seems quite interesting..

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 07, 2005 10:43 am i'm guessing it will be sold in a similar manner to the evangelion manga, yet with fewer books. sounds kind of okay, but the GoS2 manga has never been too big with me

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Thu Jul 14, 2005 10:49 pm Apparently, they're going to start printing the manga in the August issue of Newtype.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Jul 18, 2005 11:56 am This obviusly isn't going to be any where near as good as the original work by anno. I'm so sure of that, that I'm beting my lifes saveings on it ($25.67). I may buy this, but I'll probly spend my money on Argentosoma collection disc or maybe NGE plat 5-7 not sure yet... O yeah, knowing ADV (or even america for that matter) they'll probly have changed what ever the story had in it to suit the public (or their own asses) just like all the cuts from NGE on the cartoon network (god that pisses me off... THEY EDITED THE BEER CANS FOR GOD'S SAKE)

[]:             Quote Post by Jomei » Thu Jul 21, 2005 8:47 pm I found out about this minutes after renewing my Newtype subscription. Nice bonus, amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Jul 26, 2005 4:24 pm I suppose. If you're rich.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Aug 07, 2005 12:42 am Hi guys! I'm a newbbie, but I enjoy the EvaMonkey website from a lot of time. Fianlly I've decided to register me (I was scared cause you're forum is a little big and I don't speak English very well, I'm Italian). In my country this manga is started the last month, the idea is good, but the drawing is horrible. I want to know more about the events, I 'd like to play to the game, but for some strange reason it stops to works after some minutes (can anyone help me? also with PM). The original GoS is really excellent, and I'm asking why they do make some stuffs like thsi from this game and with a better mangaka (asking Sadamoto is too much?). Well, to ckomplete my off topic introduction my favorite char is Kaworu, that's all for now, I hope that you won't be hungry for my off topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Aug 07, 2005 8:01 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: asking Sadamoto is too much?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Aug 08, 2005 4:01 pm Ryo wrote: Now, imagine an Asuka drawn by Ken Akamatsu... :drools:

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Aug 09, 2005 8:22 am Ryo wrote: Hyper Shinchan wrote: asking Sadamoto is too much?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Aug 09, 2005 10:22 am In My Oppinion

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Aug 09, 2005 6:01 pm Hunter21 wrote: He already did that. It's a imaginary fantasy scene by Keitaro with Naru dressed up in Asuka's plug suit. Which is exactly what Asuka would look like if Akamatsu drew her. He would probably just drop the antennas.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 1:33 pm AchtungAffen wrote: In My Oppinion
